Clementine, works at E0 and effiency improves with every following Enlightenment

1. Yeah, Helot will make it very easy since she'll raise the overall Damage Output of Mouchette via her Exalt due to it raising Strike Damage and she can also search for base Strikes as a Bonus with her 1-Cost
2. Yeah, that's definitely something to consider. If your Mouchette is not heavily invested in you'd probably be better off running her with Crimson Pulse to raise your Crit Chance which is one of her favourite Stats to have
3. Yeah, it'll be oaky but I'd advise against it as the current Daffodil Event will be ending soon so you'll be better off waiting for Xu's Event to use your Stamina Refills there
4. Pity is shared between the Category of Banners. The Single Target & Triple Rerun will share Pity with eachother, just keep in mind that Event & Standard are seperate much like Characters to Weapons

Wut teams does Pollux slot into?
What I a warden though?

aurita is a multi multi multi hit character who relies on tentacle hits to deal damage, she wants a tentacle focused team and one that can play with her discard effect

daffodil is a poison/counter character who wants you to put her in a poison or counter team to make full use of her mirages. her direct damage is not high

what this means is you should make 2 teams <:agree:1400771815076528258>
And yeah you might have trouble surviving on this team

What is a Warden though?

Warden = Tank
Chorus = Support
Assault = DPS
But that has since changed
The roles are interchangable
the roles are like what the character was originally designed as, not necessarily what role they are good at now
Better to look at their Enlightenments, Exalts and Skills
To get an idea of what their role is

Both are usable at E0, but Clementine really wants her E1 for convenience, otherwise getting stacks for her exalt takes a bit too long <:HelotFish:1441898290047353004>
